TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ciliksay, title = Ciliksay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ciliksay} }

S.FORM: Ciliksay alang Ciliksay ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Cinkong Song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 155 buwan, 372 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 73% kyan ku 270 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 27% kyan ku 102 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 69%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ciliksay hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Ciliksay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Ciliksay hya' ga Hikasiki go. tay mkraya' na Ciliksay hya' ga Nakahama go. tay mkraya' na Ciliksay hya' ga Madawdaw. tay mkyahu' na Ciliksay hya' ga Kahciday. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan khu skwan biru maki 1 khu skwan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

Ciliksay alang Ciliksay ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Cinkong Song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 155 buwan, 372 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 73% kyan ku 270 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 27% kyan ku 102 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 69%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ciliksay hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Ciliksay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Ciliksay hya' ga Hikasiki go. tay mkraya' na Ciliksay hya' ga Nakahama go. tay mkraya' na Ciliksay hya' ga Madawdaw. tay mkyahu' na Ciliksay hya' ga Kahciday. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan khu skwan biru maki 1 khu skwan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: ¶~ ®iliks~…ēaj alaŇč ¶~ ®iliks~…ēaj …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu ¶~ ®inkoŇč s~…ēoŇč, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē **%, pajwan *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na ¶~ ®iliks~…ēaj ńßja Ē …£a ws~…ēiluŇč krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na ¶~ ®iliks~…ēaj ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na ¶~ ®iliks~…ēaj ńßja Ē …£a ńßikas~…ēiki …£o. taj mkraja Ē na ¶~ ®iliks~…ēaj ńßja Ē …£a nakańßama …£o. taj mkraja Ē na ¶~ ®iliks~…ēaj ńßja Ē …£a ma*aw*aw. taj mkjańßu Ē na ¶~ ®iliks~…ēaj ńßja Ē …£a kańß ¶~ ®i*aj. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan kńßu s~…ēkwan ő≤iru maki * kńßu s~…ēkwan ő≤iru. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
